name: Market Cap Calculation
short_description: Calculates the market capitalization of a crypto token based on its circulating supply and current price.

inputs.name: supply
inputs.description: The total circulating supply of tokens.

inputs.name: price
inputs.description: The current price per token in USD.

name: Token Price Calculation
short_description: Calculates the price per token by dividing the total market capitalization by the circulating supply of tokens.

inputs.name: market_cap
inputs.description: The total market capitalization of the crypto token.

inputs.name: supply
inputs.description: The total circulating supply of the crypto token.

name: Staking Reward Effect on Market Cap
short_description: Calculates the new market capitalization of a crypto token after a percentage of tokens are locked through staking, leading to a price increase.

inputs.name: price
inputs.description: Initial trading price per token in USD.

inputs.name: lock_percent
inputs.description: Percentage of tokens locked through staking.

inputs.name: price_increase
inputs.description: Percentage increase in token price due to staking.

name: Emission Schedule Impact on Market Cap
short_description: Calculates the new market capitalization of a crypto token after additional tokens are issued, assuming the price per token remains constant.

inputs.name: supply
inputs.description: Current circulating supply of the crypto token.

inputs.name: price
inputs.description: Current price per token in USD.

inputs.name: emission_percent
inputs.description: Percentage of the current supply to be issued as new tokens.

name: Multifactor Tokenomics Analysis
short_description: Calculates the final market capitalization of a crypto token considering initial supply and price, token burn, new token emission, and market-driven price adjustments.

inputs.name: supply
inputs.description: Initial circulating supply of the crypto token.

inputs.name: price
inputs.description: Initial price of the crypto token in USD.

inputs.name: burn_percent
inputs.description: Percentage of tokens burned from the supply (e.g., 5 for 5%).

inputs.name: emission_percent
inputs.description: Percentage of new tokens issued relative to the supply (e.g., 10 for 10%).

inputs.name: market_reaction
inputs.description: Percentage change in token price due to market reaction (e.g., -5 for -5% or 10 for 10%).
